prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-6MMWBHWBACA-BL Product Type: CUP_HOLDER Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Universal Water Bottle Carrying Ring Attachment Clip Holder with Carabiner for Backpacks and Hiking Description: Now you can conveniently attach your water bottle to your bike, backpack or camping gear with the Water Bottle Holder With Blue Carabiner Clip. A hands free water bottle attachment makes it easier to be mobile on the go with all hands free!

The water bottle holder is made out of durable silicon and can attach easily to most water bottles. This water bottle holder is attached to the aluminum carabiner by a durable nylon strap. The carabiner can be attached to any outdoor gear for easy convenience. It also can be used to carry a set of keys.

Never worry about how to carry your water bottle wherever you go again with this Water Bottle Holder with Blue Carabiner Clip. Search Terms: nylon strap water bottle hanger holder aluminum carabiner water bottle clip water bottle attachment Features: - Conveniently attach your water bottle to your bike, backpack or camping gear - Universal Fit hands free water bottle attachment - Heavy Duty Rubber Slip-On Water Bottle Holder - Durable nylon strap wtih silicon ring attachment that fits snuggly around all size water bottle necks - Aluminum Carabiner with Key Ring === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Blue Water Bottle Holder Carabiner Clip

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor Blue Water Bottle Holder With Carabiner

anthropic.title_differentiation: Universal Fit, Aluminum Carabiner, Durable Nylon Strap, Silicon Ring, Hands Free, Backpack And Bike Attachment

openai.title_differentiation: Universal Fit, Silicone Ring Attachment, Nylon Strap, Aluminum Carabiner, Key Ring, Hands-Free Carry
